faq_general_a1: Homeverse is a leading real estate marketplace in Egypt connecting buyers, sellers, and renters with premium properties.
faq_general_q2: How do I create an account?
faq_general_a2: Click "Register" in the navigation bar and fill in your details including name, email, phone, and password.
faq_general_a3: Browsing and creating a basic account is free. Listing properties may have fees depending on your plan.
faq_buying_q1: How do I search for properties?
faq_buying_a1: Use the Properties page to browse listings. Filter by type (rent/sale) and search by location.
faq_buying_q2: How do I contact a property agent?
faq_buying_a2: Each property detail page shows the agent info. Use "Send Inquiry" to message them directly.
faq_buying_a3: Contact the agent directly to discuss pricing and negotiations.
faq_selling_q1: How do I list my property?
faq_selling_a1: Log into your dashboard, go to "My Properties", click "Add Property" and fill in all details.
faq_selling_a2: Upload high-quality images of all rooms, exterior, and amenities. 5+ photos get more inquiries.
faq_security_q1: How do I reset my password?
faq_security_a1: Click "Forgot Password?" on the login page and enter your email for a reset link.
faq_security_a2: We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols.
